description_long: This is a light-colored bucket hat with a wide, gently sloping brim that encircles the entire crown. The crown is rounded and moderately tall, with a smooth, seamless appearance and subtle stitching details. Three small metal eyelets are visible on one side, likely for ventilation. At the back, two long, narrow fabric ties extend downward, suggesting the hat can be secured under the chin or behind the head. The brim features concentric stitched lines, adding both structure and visual interest. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for sun protection in urban outdoor settings.
description: A light-colored bucket hat with a wide, stitched brim, rounded crown, ventilation eyelets, and long fabric ties at the back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded crown, wide stitched brim, three metal eyelets, and one fabric tie trailing from the back.
description_view_1: Direct side view highlighting the three metal eyelets and the continuous, gently sloping brim with visible stitching.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying both long fabric ties extending from the back and the smooth, rounded crown.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the two long fabric ties and the symmetrical, circular shape of the crown and brim.
